initialization_contract.a: independent deterministic torch.nn.init.kaiming_uniform_ with a=sqrt(5), standard PEFT default

degeneracy_guard.reason: At A=B=0, (+sigma*B_noise)@(+sigma*A_noise) equals (-sigma*B_noise)@(-sigma*A_noise), so the antithetic central difference is identically zero.
